profile.headline: AI Developer & Marketing Analytics Leader
profile.shortBio: AI consultant and ML engineer with 9+ years of experience delivering generative AI consulting, LLM applications, and RAG systems that drive measurable business outcomes. I specialize in AI strategy consulting, AI automation, marketing analytics, and full-stack product delivery using Python, FastAPI, Next.js, TypeScript, and cloud-native architecture. Open to freelance, consulting, and collaboration opportunities.
fullBioParagraphs: I am an AI consultant and ML engineer with 9+ years of hands-on experience designing and delivering production-grade AI systems for enterprises and growth-focused teams. My work spans AI consulting services, machine learning consulting services, marketing analytics, and full-stack product engineering built for reliability, speed, and business impact.

I specialize in generative AI consulting services, LLM consulting, and RAG development services, helping teams turn complex ideas into practical products. This includes AI agent development services, AI chatbot development services, marketing analytics consulting, and AI integration services that improve decision-making, automate workflows, and reduce operational friction.

From an engineering perspective, I build end-to-end solutions across data pipelines, model orchestration, backend APIs, and modern web interfaces. My core stack includes Python, FastAPI, SQL, Next.js, React, and TypeScript, with a focus on observability, performance, security, and maintainable architecture.

I approach every engagement with an outcome-first mindset: understand the business context deeply, design the right system, and ship with clear metrics for success. If you are looking for an AI consultant in India for enterprise AI consulting, AI transformation consulting, marketing analytics, or product-focused delivery, I bring strategy and execution together. Available for freelance projects, consulting engagements, and full-time roles.

projects.title: Adticks
projects.tagline: SaaS Platform for Technical SEO, AEO, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
projects.impactSummary: Engineered from scratch by Madhu Dadi, Adticks operates as a comprehensive search intelligence and AI visibility auditing platform. The crawler scales to run parallel headless rendering over 10,000 pages, mapping indexability, robot policies, and content schemas. Adticks detects JavaScript render-parity bottlenecks where core text, pricing, and schema.org markup are hidden from bots, resulting in significant indexing and AI Overview citation lift. The platform's automated diagnostics reduce technical audit cycle times by 85% and deliver prioritized action queues for modern search platforms.
projects.coverImageAlt: Adticks search and AI visibility measurement platform, designed and built by Madhu Dadi.
projects.problemStatement: As search behavior shifts from traditional ten blue links to AI Overviews and conversational answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity), brands struggle to measure and maintain their visibility across LLM systems. Standard web crawlers fail to diagnose accessibility issues specific to generative crawlers (e.g., GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot). Furthermore, client-side JavaScript rendering issues often hide critical semantic content, entity relationships, and schema.org templates from LLM crawlers, leading to omission from AI citations.
projects.solutionApproach: To solve this, Madhu Dadi designed and built Adticks as a unified inside-out site auditing engine. The core system runs parallel headless crawls using Playwright to identify render parity gaps between raw server HTML and fully client-rendered DOM. It audits robots.txt directives, sitemaps, structured data schemas, and llms.txt configurations. The backend, built with FastAPI and Celery workers, schedules deep site crawls, parses code with selectolax, runs 18 parallel audit analyzers, and outputs actionable, severity-prioritized fix queues tailored for SEO, AEO, and GEO optimization.

projects.title: Technical Blog
projects.tagline: In-depth articles on AI, RAG, and Modern Web Engineering
projects.impactSummary: The implementation of the technical blog has significantly elevated learning efficacy and traffic engagement. By focusing on high-intent AI and engineering topics, the platform achieves organic search rankings and attracts developers seeking advanced technical solutions. The RAG AI Assistant successfully processes user queries in real-time, providing immediate contextual answers with direct citations, reducing user search latencies by an estimated 80%. Automated continuous integration and post-deployment cache warming have stabilized page traversal speeds (low TTFB), ensuring a high-quality experience for both search bots and human learners.
projects.problemStatement: Modern software developers, AI engineers, and data analysts struggle with highly fragmented, surface-level technical learning resources. Many online guides explain the basic hello-world concepts of Large Language Models (LLMs) and systems engineering, but fail to address the critical edge cases, structural design decisions, and real-world deployment challenges of complex pipelines like Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Furthermore, static documentation lacks interactive elements and immediate searchability, forcing engineers to manually browse through endless forum posts and code repositories to find verified, idiomatic implementation patterns.
projects.solutionApproach: To solve this problem, I built and engineered a learning-focused technical blog platform designed specifically around in-depth technical deep dives and interactive education. The core application structure features series-based learning paths where technical concepts are taught progressively. I integrated a custom, production-grade AI Assistant powered by a localized Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline, allowing visitors to get immediate, technically accurate, grounded answers directly from the blog's localized vector database. The architecture was engineered with Next.js for server-rendered page speeds, Tailwind CSS for modern aesthetics, and a secure FastAPI backend supporting custom execution runtime test runners.

projects.title: Udemy Enroller using FastAPI
projects.impactSummary: Reduced manual effort by around 90% and enabled users to enroll in multiple courses within seconds. Improved efficiency, eliminated repetitive tasks, and ensured users never miss time-limited learning opportunities. Received 20000+ courses within 6 months for free and estimated cost savings of ₹10,00,000+ The automated platform successfully eliminated 100% of manual enrollment effort for its users. By leveraging asynchronous queues, the system scales seamlessly to handle hundreds of concurrent coupon processing requests, ensuring users never miss a time-sensitive learning opportunity while strictly adhering to platform rate limits.
projects.problemStatement: Finding free or discounted Udemy courses is a repetitive and time-sensitive process. Users have to manually browse multiple coupon sites, copy links, and enroll quickly before offers expire. This often leads to missed opportunities and inefficient use of time. Previously, this process was completely manual, requiring users to constantly monitor for free course coupons and manually log in to claim them before they expired. This resulted in significant time wasted and many missed learning opportunities due to timezone differences and short coupon validity windows. The system needed a robust, high-availability architecture capable of handling asynchronous task queues and rate-limiting gracefully.
projects.solutionApproach: Developed a FastAPI-based automation system that scrapes coupon websites, extracts course links, and automatically enrolls users using session-based authentication. The system uses async processing to handle multiple enrollments efficiently with minimal manual input. I engineered a scalable backend service using FastAPI to manage the core API layer, integrated with Celery and Redis for asynchronous task processing. The system implements a robust scraping and validation pipeline that automatically authenticates, verifies coupon validity, and enrolls users without manual intervention. I also built a comprehensive logging and monitoring system to track success rates and handle CAPTCHAs or IP blocks.
